subcodes.title: Conversation with Dr Finkelstein, Abu Sinan, 1915-02-28
subcodes.first_line: Such gatherings are only possible through the divine bounties and favours... Yes, indeed. The relationship between the East and the West must be like that
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینگونه مجالس بصرف فضل و اراده الهیه تشکیل میشود و الا ما کجا و شما کجا چه نسبتی در میان است
